event: A Chat with His Lordship — Equestrian Scene
description: A small landscape painting showing a country road scene. Two riders on horseback are stopped to converse with passengers in a horse-drawn carriage pulled by two dark horses. Several dogs (spaniels or hunting dogs) accompany the group on the ground. The setting is a tree-lined country lane with autumn foliage in warm greens and golds. The sky is pale and overcast. The overall mood is genteel and pastoral, depicting an English sporting or country life scene.
